articles.description: Assam cops at Congress leader Pawan Kheras Delhi home day after Himanta Sarmas wife files FIR against him

articles.title: Kerala Assembly elections: Who is in power in Kerala? Key alliances & Opposition leaders
articles.description: Kerala’s political landscape appears to shift slightly following the recent local body elections, where the ruling Left Democratic Front (LDF) faced unexpected setbacks

articles.title: Pinarayi slams Rahul for drawing equivalence between LDF and Hindutva forces in Chhattisgarh
articles.description: Kerala Chief Minister says the Congress leader’s “brazenly misleading” statement smacks of an “impudence stemming from social and political illiteracy and ignorance”; he says the Congress’ “complacency and ideological ambiguity” in politically resisting Hindu majoritarian forces, including their trespasses on minorities, paved the way for the ascendancy of the Sangh Parivar-backed BJP in India

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Personalities and political loyalties to define poll outcome in central Kerala
articles.description: The Left Democratic Front had a clear upper hand in the region comprising Ernakulam, Idukki, Kottayam and Alappuzha in 2021 as it bagged 25 of the 37 Assembly seats. But this time, the shifting of political loyalty of some candidates and the fielding of some prominent individuals in some key constituencies have made the contests worth watching.

articles.title: Assam Police at Pawan Khera's residence in New Delhi; Himanta says Congress leader ‘ran away’
articles.description: The development comes amid a political tussle after Assam CM Sarma alleged that the Congress used "false information" sourced from a Pakistani social media group to level charges against his wife

articles.title: Pawan Khera vs Himanta Biswa Sarma: Assam Police arrive at Congress leader's Delhi home amid Riniki Sarma's passport row
articles.description: An Assam Police team arrived at Pawan Khera's Delhi residence on 7 April after he alleged that Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma's wife Riniki Bhuyan holds three passports and owns undisclosed UAE properties.

Since the start of the war, oil prices have risen by over 50%, though price levels in India remain steady. Check petrol & diesel prices today, 7 April.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Trump calls Artemis II crew, congratulates them on historic trip around moon

dailyNews.title: Trump, top officials share new details of rescue of U.S. airmen from Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump and top national security officials shed new light on the daring rescues of two American airmen who were shot down over Iran last week.
